hotel_name: Hampton by Hilton Shenzhen Longhua Qinghu

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 15 min walk from metro station Qing Hu Bei. Nearby basic shopping in residential area. With the price of the room seems fine for me

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The breakfast was excellent, the staff very helpful.
Restaurants and a small supermarket are close by.
reviews.negatives: The rooms feel a bit dated, specially the carpet

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Only need to have English speaking 1 person in reception, thats it, the rest is perfect

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: a bit far from city center of Shenzhen yet 1km away from Qing Hu Bei station.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: Maybe i think they need to open the hotel bar

reviews.title: 舒適清潔
reviews.text:
服務態度良好，硬件看得出有用心設計，清潔保養也很好，唯一挑剔是交通不算方便，出入要call 車

最近的地鐵站離酒店有1.6 公里

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The staff specifically the front desk is very supportive 
And the room service is fast respond

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.negatives: Nous avons déploré que le personnel ne parle que chinois.

reviews.title: trotzdem ein guter Auffenthalt
reviews.positives: Das Frühstück war sehr gut, das Personal sehr gut, die Lage war ok aber nicht super
reviews.negatives: Das Rollstuhlzimmer hatte keinen Duschsitz oder Duschstuhl, und unter dem Waschbecken war es nicht möglich mit Rollstuhl zu kommen

reviews.title: bad service
reviews.negatives: the people at the counter did not know english, the first time we had arrived the check in took too long and they made so many mistakes we had to correct them multiple times. they first couldnt find our booking, then told us to pay a fee/deposit of 1000 rmb. whether it was the fee for the room or a deposit that we are gonna get it back was unclear as i said the people at the reception could not speak english and relied on the translator app of apple, and i think everyone knows its one of the worst translators out there. we had booked 2 nights for 902 rmb which we had to pay when we arrived to hotel but they assumed we already made an online payment and had to pay for the room now (1000 rmb) it wasnt until i said we never made an online payment that they said oh ok pay 902 rmb then. first, they got our booking date wrong, then they asked us to pay a deposit far more than the fee for one night, and finally they got our room fee wrong. the whole thing lasted for half an hour and i have never experienced something like this before. i really did not expect a hilton hotel to not have english-speaking people at the reception.

reviews.title: The room rate did trade off the inconvenience of the transportation
reviews.negatives: It’s really far from Train Station and hard to find Taxi around

reviews.title: A good price, but far from the subway.
reviews.positives: Spacious rooms with a good bathroom and great shower. Very good breakfast with a variety of local and international food options.
reviews.negatives: The location isn't very appealing; there aren't many restaurants or nearby metro stations. Communication with the English-speaking staff requires using a translation app on your phone. The staff tries to be helpful, but the language barrier is a bit of a challenge.

reviews.title: Real 4 star International brand.
reviews.negatives: Hard to get a taxi. Reception helped me order one at departure.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: In my room may it's not in the other rooms the air conditioning is not quite at night even in the lower level

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good location according our meetings, the personal were very polite and speedy Mr. Vision and duty managers Mr. Leo and Miss Mia. They help us rebook cause of late arrivals to hotel. They help.us with breakfast and room. The view was perfect.  The breakfast was smorgasbord. Thank you for your hospitality.
reviews.negatives: We found some stains on the sofa.

reviews.title: The highlight of my stay was the staff. Ken the manager drove me himself on his little scooter to go pick up a cable for
reviews.positives: Rooms are clean and large. The little delivry robot was cool. Weird cleaning schudule but efficient. A 24 hour convenience store a couple of food places nearby. asome older xiaomaibu placeary two.
reviews.negatives: Door never closed properly on first try and I couldnt work work out light stick combonation system: Otherwise it was great. Gum could you a cable machine but otherwise fine.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good spread of breakfast. Nice clean comfortable rooms
